data.title: Sky High Brands wins big at 2025 America's Best Beverage Awards. Iowa-based brand dominates with back-to-back wins in billion-dollar hemp-derived THC beverage category.
data.description: Iowa's Sky High Brands continues to dominate the thriving billion-dollar market for hemp-derived THC beverages. The company recently secured consecutive victories, solidifying its position as a top player in the industry. This recognition comes amidst the continued growth of the sector, which shows no indication of slowing down. The Iowa-based brand's success highlights the escalating demand for functional hemp and cannabis drinks.

data.title: Digital Silk, a digital agency, offers brand audit tips on brand consistency, positioning, and digital performance.
data.description: A recently released article by Digital Silk, a Miami-based digital agency specializing in brand strategies, custom websites, and digital marketing campaigns, highlights the importance of brand audits in examining brand consistency, positioning, and digital performance. The piece delves into the significance of conducting these audits to ensure that brands resonate effectively with their target audiences in the digital realm. The article serves as a useful resource for businesses looking to enhance their online presence and improve their brand strategy. This publication is part of Digital Silk's ongoing efforts to educate companies on maximizing their digital impact.

data.title: A segment about deported Venezuelan men to a prison in El Salvador was pulled from '60 Minutes' but has since been circulating online.
data.description: In a recent CBS News segment, it was reported that Venezuelan males were unexpectedly deported by the Trump administration to a prison in El Salvador. Despite efforts to withhold the information, the segment eventually leaked online, garnering attention and raising concerns about the deportation process and the fate of those individuals.

data.title: Fed unlikely to cut rates until stock market collapses, keeping Bitcoin and Ethereum stagnant; analyst predicts this till summer 2026. Fed rescues stocks, ignores crypto drops. Bitcoin bled against S&P in 2019 until Fed cut rates post-stock market crash.
data.description: Renowned cryptocurrency analyst Ben Cowen predicts that the Federal Reserve will not significantly reduce interest rates until a stock market crash occurs. This scenario is expected to keep Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) stagnant within a certain price range until the summer of 2026. Cowen highlighted that the Federal Reserve tends to intervene only when the stock market is in trouble, disregarding the fluctuations in the cryptocurrency market. Drawing parallels to 2019, he mentioned that Bitcoin faced challenges against the S&P 500 (NYSE: SPY) while stocks remained resilient until the Fed implemented drastic rate cuts and injected money into the economy post the stock market collapse. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Brazil's orchestra will translate Bitcoin price changes into music, raising funds under tax-deductible laws for a live show in the capital.
data.description: The project has been granted permission to solicit private funding with tax benefits in Brazil under the country's cultural incentive regulations. A live performance is scheduled to take place in the federal capital as part of this initiative.

data.title: Dogecoin surged post 2024 election but fell short of $1 target due to supply math and low demand. Elon Musk's support fueled speculation.
data.description: Dogecoin appeared to be on track for a significant surge following the 2024 presidential election, with hopes of reaching $1, but these aspirations were dashed by a combination of factors. The cryptocurrency gained momentum post-Donald Trump's election win in November 2024, experiencing a 152% surge within a month, reaching a peak near $0.4846 by the end of the year. Speculation reignited regarding the possibility of Dogecoin hitting $1, especially after Trump appointed Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to head the Department of Government Efficiency shortened to "DOGE." This move triggered aggressive buying due to Musk's vocal endorsement of the token. However, the $1 target faced a significant hurdle in the form of supply dynamics. To reach $1, Dogecoin's market cap would need to reach approximately $147 billion, based on its current circulating supply, leading to challenges in liquidity and real-world demand.

data.title: AI infrastructure stocks like GE Vernova (GEV) predicted a $52 billion revenue by 2028, with a 2026 guidance of $41-42 billion. Analysts praise the stock with a price target of $855 as it's becoming crucial for AI power surge.
data.description: As we enter 2026, the industrial sector is increasingly crucial for high-growth AI infrastructure. Power emerges as a significant bottleneck in the AI build-out, benefitting companies involved in generating, moving, and cooling electricity for AI data center builds. GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) stands out as a leader in this sector, with a revenue target of $52 billion by 2028 and a $200 billion backlog. In 2026, they forecast revenues of $41-42 billion. Analysts, like Oppenheimer's Colin Rusch, have upgraded the stock with a price target of $855 due to significant orders from hyperscalers. The industrial sector is poised for substantial growth, with GEV stock reflecting these positive trends.

data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase due to unexpected third-quarter GDP data. Novo stock saw a considerable rise following FDA approval of a weight loss pill. The S&P 500 is nearing a record high, with software stocks showing continued growth. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily, offering live coverage of the latest market trends.

data.title: Law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is investigating uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE) for potential securities law violations.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on December 23, 2025, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is conducting a probe into potential breaches of federal securities laws for investors of uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE). The investigation stems from events on November 3, 2025 involving uniQure. The law firm's website is www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Dickey's Barbecue Pit celebrates 85 years with Kids Eat Free promo nationwide from Dec 26 to Jan 31, 2026. #FamilyMeals
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit, the largest barbecue franchise globally, is making family meals more economical as households return to regular routines post-holidays. In celebration of their 85th anniversary, Dickey’s launches the Kids Eat Free offer nationwide from December 26, 2025, to January 31, 2026. For more than 80 years, Dickey’s has been the go-to spot for families to enjoy Legit. Texas. Barbecue™ together.
